accept.rawDefinition: To receive, especially with a consent, with favour, or with approval.

accident.rawDefinition: An unexpected event with negative consequences occurring without the intention of the one suffering the consequences.

active.rawDefinition: A person or thing that is acting or capable of acting.

actually.rawDefinition: (modal) In act or in fact; really; in truth; positively.

adult.rawDefinition: A fully grown human or animal.

advantage.rawDefinition: Any condition, circumstance, opportunity or means, particularly favorable to success, or to any desired end.

adventure.rawDefinition: The encountering of risks; a bold undertaking, in which dangers are likely to be encountered, and the issue is staked upon unforeseen events; a daring feat.

advertise.rawDefinition: To give (especially public) notice of (something); to announce publicly.

advertisement.rawDefinition: A commercial solicitation designed to sell some commodity, service or similar.

advertising.rawDefinition: To give (especially public) notice of (something); to announce publicly.

airline.rawDefinition: A company that flies airplanes to transport people and goods.

allow.rawDefinition: To grant, give, admit, accord, afford, or yield; to let one have.

almost.rawDefinition: Something or someone that doesn't quite make it.

already.rawDefinition: Prior to some specified time, either past, present, or future; by this time; previously.

although.rawDefinition: Though, even though, in spite of or despite the fact that: introducing a clause that expresses a concession.

among.rawDefinition: Denotes a mingling or intermixing with distinct or separable objects. (See Usage Note at amidst.)

amount.rawDefinition: The total, aggregate or sum of material (not applicable to discrete numbers or units or items in standard English).

ancient.rawDefinition: A person who is very old.

ankle.rawDefinition: The skeletal joint which connects the foot with the leg; the uppermost portion of the foot and lowermost portion of the leg, which contain this skeletal joint.

any more.rawDefinition: (in negative or interrogative constructions) From a given time onwards; longer, again.

anywhere.rawDefinition: In or at any location or an unknown location.

app.rawDefinition: An application (program), especially a small one designed for a mobile device.

appear.rawDefinition: To come or be in sight; to be in view; to become visible.

argue.rawDefinition: To show grounds for concluding (that); to indicate, imply.

argument.rawDefinition: A fact or statement used to support a proposition; a reason.

army.rawDefinition: A large, highly organized military force, concerned mainly with ground (rather than air or naval) operations.

arrange.rawDefinition: To set up; to organize; to put into an orderly sequence or arrangement.

asleep.rawDefinition: In a state of sleep; also, broadly, resting.

assistant.rawDefinition: Someone who is present; a bystander, a witness.

attack.rawDefinition: An attempt to cause damage, injury to, or death of opponent or enemy.

attractive.rawDefinition: Causing attraction; having the quality of attracting by inherent force.

audience.rawDefinition: A group of people within hearing; specifically, a large gathering of people listening to or watching a performance, speech, etc.

author.rawDefinition: The originator or creator of a work, especially of a literary composition.

available.rawDefinition: Such as one may avail oneself of; capable of being used for the accomplishment of a purpose.

avoid.rawDefinition: To try not to meet or communicate with (a person); to shun

award.rawDefinition: A judgment, sentence, or final decision. Specifically: The decision of arbitrators in a case submitted.

background.rawDefinition: One's social heritage, or previous life; what one did in the past.

bar.rawDefinition: A solid, more or less rigid object of metal or wood with a uniform cross-section smaller than its length.

baseball.rawDefinition: A sport common in North America, the Caribbean, and Japan, in which the object is to strike a ball so that one of a nine-person team can run counter-clockwise among four bases, resulting in the scoring of a run. The team with the most runs after termination of play, usually nine innings, wins.

based.rawDefinition: To give as its foundation or starting point; to lay the foundation of.

basketball.rawDefinition: A sport in which two opposing teams of five players strive to put a ball through a hoop.

bean.rawDefinition: A reusable software component written in Java.

bear.rawDefinition: A large omnivorous mammal, related to the dog and raccoon, having shaggy hair, a very small tail, and flat feet; a member of family Ursidae.

beef.rawDefinition: The meat from a cow, bull or other bovine.

behave.rawDefinition: To conduct (oneself) well, or in a given way.

belt.rawDefinition: A band worn around the waist to hold clothing to one's body (usually pants), hold weapons (such as a gun or sword), or serve as a decorative piece of clothing.

best.rawDefinition: The supreme effort one can make, or has made.

better.rawDefinition: An entity, usually animate, deemed superior to another; one who has a claim to precedence; a superior.

between.rawDefinition: A kind of needle, shorter than a sharp, with a small rounded eye, used for making fine stitches on heavy fabrics.

bin.rawDefinition: A box, frame, crib, or enclosed place, used as a storage container.

biology.rawDefinition: The study of all life or living matter.

birth.rawDefinition: The process of childbearing; the beginning of life.

biscuit.rawDefinition: (rare in the US) A small, flat, baked good which is either hard and crisp or else soft but firm: a cookie.

bit.rawDefinition: A piece of metal placed in a horse's mouth and connected to the reins to direct the animal.

blank.rawDefinition: A small French coin, originally of silver, afterwards of copper, worth 5 deniers; also a silver coin of Henry V current in the parts of France then held by the English, worth about 8 pence .

blood.rawDefinition: A member of the Los Angeles gang The Bloods.

board.rawDefinition: A relatively long, wide and thin piece of any material, usually wood or similar, often for use in construction or furniture-making.

boil.rawDefinition: A localized accumulation of pus in the skin, resulting from infection.

bone.rawDefinition: A composite material consisting largely of calcium phosphate and collagen and making up the skeleton of most vertebrates.

borrow.rawDefinition: Deviation of the path of a rolling ball from a straight line; slope; slant.

boss.rawDefinition: A person who oversees and directs the work of others; a supervisor.

bowl.rawDefinition: A roughly hemispherical container used to hold, mix or present food, such as salad, fruit or soup, or other items.

brain.rawDefinition: The control center of the central nervous system of an animal located in the skull which is responsible for perception, cognition, attention, memory, emotion, and action.

bridge.rawDefinition: A construction or natural feature that spans a divide.

bright.rawDefinition: An artist's brush used in oil and acrylic painting with a long ferrule and a flat, somewhat tapering bristle head.

cooker.rawDefinition: A device for heating food, a stove.

copy.rawDefinition: The result of copying; an identical duplicate of an original.

corner.rawDefinition: The point where two converging lines meet; an angle, either external or internal.

count.rawDefinition: The act of counting or tallying a quantity.

couple.rawDefinition: Two partners in a romantic or sexual relationship.

crazy.rawDefinition: An insane or eccentric person; a crackpot.

creative.rawDefinition: A person directly involved in a creative marketing process.

crime.rawDefinition: A specific act committed in violation of the law.

criminal.rawDefinition: A person who is guilty of a crime, notably breaking the law.

cross.rawDefinition: A geometrical figure consisting of two straight lines or bars intersecting each other such that at least one of them is bisected by the other.

crowd.rawDefinition: A group of people congregated or collected into a close body without order.

crowded.rawDefinition: To press forward; to advance by pushing.

cry.rawDefinition: A shedding of tears; the act of crying.

cupboard.rawDefinition: A board or table used to openly hold and display silver plate and other dishware; a sideboard; a buffet.

curly.rawDefinition: A person or animal with curly hair.

cycle.rawDefinition: An interval of space or time in which one set of events or phenomena is completed.

daily.rawDefinition: Something that is produced, consumed, used, or done every day.

data.rawDefinition: (plural: data) A measurement of something on a scale understood by both the recorder (a person or device) and the reader (another person or device). The scale is arbitrarily defined, such as from 1 to 10 by ones, 1 to 100 by 0.1, or simply true or false, on or off, yes, no, or maybe, etc.

dead.rawDefinition: (with "the", a demonstrative, or a possessive) Those who have died.

deal.rawDefinition: A division, a portion, a share.

death.rawDefinition: The cessation of life and all associated processes; the end of an organism's existence as an entity independent from its environment and its return to an inert, nonliving state.

deep.rawDefinition: (with "the") The deep part of a lake, sea, etc.

degree.rawDefinition: A stage of proficiency or qualification in a course of study, now especially an award bestowed by a university or, in some countries, a college, as a certification of academic achievement. (In the United States, can include secondary schools.)

dentist.rawDefinition: A medical doctor who specializes in dentistry.

depend.rawDefinition: (followed by on or upon, formerly also by of) To be contingent or conditioned; to have something as a necessary condition; to hinge on.

desert.rawDefinition: (usually in the plural) That which is deserved or merited; a just punishment or reward

designer.rawDefinition: A person who designs something, or who designs things as a profession.

destroy.rawDefinition: To damage beyond use or repair.

detective.rawDefinition: (law enforcement) A police officer who looks for evidence as part of solving a crime; an investigator.

develop.rawDefinition: To change with a specific direction, progress.

device.rawDefinition: Any piece of equipment made for a particular purpose, especially a mechanical or electrical one.

diary.rawDefinition: A daily log of experiences, especially those of the writer.

direction.rawDefinition: A theoretical line (physically or mentally) followed from a point of origin or towards a destination. May be relative (e.g. up, left, outbound, dorsal), geographical (e.g. north), rotational (e.g. clockwise), or with respect to an object or location (e.g. toward Boston).

director.rawDefinition: One who directs; the person in charge of managing a department or directorate (e.g., director of engineering), project, or production (as in a show or film, e.g., film director).

disagree.rawDefinition: To fail to agree; to have a different opinion or belief.

disaster.rawDefinition: An unexpected natural or man-made catastrophe of substantial extent causing significant physical damage or destruction, loss of life or sometimes permanent change to the natural environment.

discover.rawDefinition: To find or learn something for the first time.

discussion.rawDefinition: Conversation or debate concerning a particular topic.

disease.rawDefinition: An abnormal condition of a human, animal or plant that causes discomfort or dysfunction; distinct from injury insofar as the latter is usually instantaneously acquired.

distance.rawDefinition: The amount of space between two points, usually geographical points, usually (but not necessarily) measured along a straight line.

divorced.rawDefinition: To legally dissolve a marriage between two people.

document.rawDefinition: An original or official paper used as the basis, proof, or support of anything else, including any writing, book, or other instrument conveying information pertinent to such proof or support.

double.rawDefinition: Twice the number, amount, size, etc.

download.rawDefinition: A file transfer to the local computer.

downstairs.rawDefinition: The lower floor of a house, at ground level.

drama.rawDefinition: A composition, normally in prose, telling a story and intended to be represented by actors impersonating the characters and speaking the dialogue

dream.rawDefinition: Imaginary events seen in the mind while sleeping.

drive.rawDefinition: Motivation to do or achieve something; ability coupled with ambition.

driving.rawDefinition: To provide an impetus for motion or other physical change, to move an object by means of the provision of force thereto.

drop.rawDefinition: A small quantity of liquid, just large enough to hold its own round shape via surface tension, especially one that falls from a source of liquid.

drug.rawDefinition: A substance used to treat an illness, relieve a symptom, or modify a chemical process in the body for a specific purpose.

dry.rawDefinition: The process by which something is dried.

earn.rawDefinition: To gain (success, reward, recognition) through applied effort or work.

earth.rawDefinition: The third planet of the Solar System; the world upon which humans live.

education.rawDefinition: The process of imparting knowledge, skill and judgment.

electric.rawDefinition: (usually with definite article) Electricity; the electricity supply.

electricity.rawDefinition: Originally, a property of amber and certain other nonconducting substances to attract lightweight material when rubbed, or the cause of this property; now understood to be a phenomenon caused by the distribution and movement of charged subatomic particles and their interaction with the electromagnetic field.

electronic.rawDefinition: : Of or pertaining to an electron or electrons.

employee.rawDefinition: An individual who provides labor to a company or another person.

employer.rawDefinition: A person, firm or other entity which pays for or hires the services of another person.

empty.rawDefinition: (usually plural) A container, especially a bottle, whose contents have been used up, leaving it empty.

energy.rawDefinition: The impetus behind all motion and all activity.

engine.rawDefinition: A large construction used in warfare, such as a battering ram, catapult etc.

engineer.rawDefinition: A person who is qualified or professionally engaged in any branch of engineering.

enter.rawDefinition: The "Enter" key on a computer keyboard.

essay.rawDefinition: (authorship) A written composition of moderate length, exploring a particular issue or subject.

everyday.rawDefinition: (rare) the ordinary or routine day or occasion

everywhere.rawDefinition: In or to all locations under discussion.

exact.rawDefinition: To demand and enforce the payment or performance of, sometimes in a forcible or imperious way.

except.rawDefinition: To exclude; to specify as being an exception.

exist.rawDefinition: (stative) to be; have existence; have being or reality

expect.rawDefinition: To predict or believe that something will happen

experience.rawDefinition: The effect upon the judgment or feelings produced by any event, whether witnessed or participated in; personal and direct impressions as contrasted with description or fancies; personal acquaintance; actual enjoyment or suffering.

fair.rawDefinition: Something which is fair (in various senses of the adjective).

fall.rawDefinition: The act of moving to a lower position under the effect of gravity.

fan.rawDefinition: A hand-held device consisting of concertinaed material, or slats of material, gathered together at one end, that may be opened out into the shape of a sector of a circle and waved back and forth in order to move air towards oneself and cool oneself.

farm.rawDefinition: A place where agricultural and similar activities take place, especially the growing of crops or the raising of livestock.

farming.rawDefinition: To work on a farm, especially in the growing and harvesting of crops.

fashion.rawDefinition: A current (constantly changing) trend, favored for frivolous rather than practical, logical, or intellectual reasons.

fat.rawDefinition: A specialized animal tissue with a high oil content, used for long-term storage of energy.

fear.rawDefinition: A strong, uncontrollable, unpleasant emotion or feeling caused by actual or perceived danger or threat.

female.rawDefinition: One of the female (feminine) sex or gender.

fiction.rawDefinition: Literary type using invented or imaginative writing, instead of real facts, usually written as prose.

field.rawDefinition: A land area free of woodland, cities, and towns; open country.

fight.rawDefinition: To contend in physical conflict, either singly or in war, battle etc.

film.rawDefinition: A thin layer of some substance; a pellicle; a membranous covering, causing opacity.

final.rawDefinition: A final examination; a test or examination given at the end of a term or class; the test that concludes a class.

finally.rawDefinition: At the end or conclusion; ultimately.

finger.rawDefinition: A slender jointed extremity of the human hand, exclusive of the thumb.

finish.rawDefinition: An end; the end of anything.

firstly.rawDefinition: In the first place; before anything else; first.

fit.rawDefinition: The degree to which something fits.

fly.rawDefinition: Any insect of the order Diptera; characterized by having two wings (except for some wingless species), also called true flies.

flying.rawDefinition: To hit a fly ball; to hit a fly ball that is caught for an out. Compare ground (verb) and line (verb).

following.rawDefinition: To go after; to pursue; to move behind in the same path or direction.

forest.rawDefinition: A dense uncultivated tract of trees and undergrowth, larger than woods.

fork.rawDefinition: A pronged tool having a long straight handle, used for digging, lifting, throwing etc.

forward.rawDefinition: One of the eight players (comprising two props, one hooker, two locks, two flankers and one number eight, collectively known as the pack) whose primary task is to gain and maintain possession of the ball (compare back).

fresh.rawDefinition: A rush of water, along a river or onto the land; a flood.

frog.rawDefinition: A small tailless amphibian of the order Anura that typically hops.

furniture.rawDefinition: Large movable item(s), usually in a room, which enhance(s) the room's characteristics, functionally or decoratively.

future.rawDefinition: The time ahead; those moments yet to be experienced.

gallery.rawDefinition: An institution, building, or room for the exhibition and conservation of works of art.

gas.rawDefinition: Matter in a state intermediate between liquid and plasma that can be contained only if it is fully surrounded by a solid (or in a bubble of liquid) (or held together by gravitational pull); it can condense into a liquid, or can (rarely) become a solid directly.

gate.rawDefinition: A doorlike structure outside a house.

gift.rawDefinition: Something given to another voluntarily, without charge.

goal.rawDefinition: A result that one is attempting to achieve.

god.rawDefinition: A being such as a monotheistic God: a single divine creator and ruler of the universe.

gold.rawDefinition: A heavy yellow elemental metal of great value, with atomic number 79 and symbol Au.

golf.rawDefinition: A ball game played by individuals competing against one another in which the object is to hit a ball into each of a series of (usually 18 or nine) holes in the minimum number of strokes.

grass.rawDefinition: Any plant of the family Poaceae, characterized by leaves that arise from nodes in the stem and leaf bases that wrap around the stem, especially those grown as ground cover rather than for grain.

greet.rawDefinition: To welcome in a friendly manner, either in person or through another means e.g. writing or over the phone/internet

ground.rawDefinition: The surface of the Earth, as opposed to the sky or water or underground.

guest.rawDefinition: A recipient of hospitality, specifically someone staying by invitation at the house of another.

guide.rawDefinition: Someone who guides, especially someone hired to show people around a place or an institution and offer information and explanation.

headache.rawDefinition: A pain or ache in the head.

heart.rawDefinition: A muscular organ that pumps blood through the body, traditionally thought to be the seat of emotion.

heavy.rawDefinition: A villain or bad guy; the one responsible for evil or aggressive acts.

height.rawDefinition: The distance from the base of something to the top.

hero.rawDefinition: Somebody who possesses great bravery and carries out extraordinary or noble deeds.

herself.rawDefinition: (reflexive pronoun) Her; the female object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject.

hide.rawDefinition: To put (something) in a place where it will be harder to discover or out of sight.

high.rawDefinition: A high point or position, literally or figuratively; an elevated place; a superior region; a height; the sky; heaven.

hill.rawDefinition: An elevated location smaller than a mountain.

himself.rawDefinition: (reflexive pronoun) Him; the male object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject

hit.rawDefinition: A blow; a punch; a striking against; the collision of one body against another; the stroke that touches anything.

hockey.rawDefinition: Ice hockey, a game on ice in which two teams of six players skate and try to score by shooting a puck into the opposing team's net, using their sticks.

hole.rawDefinition: A hollow place or cavity; an excavation; a pit; an opening in or through a solid body, a fabric, etc.; a perforation; a rent; a fissure.

hope.rawDefinition: To want something to happen, with a sense of expectation that it might.

human.rawDefinition: A human being, whether man, woman or child.

hurt.rawDefinition: An emotional or psychological humiliation or bad experience.

illness.rawDefinition: An instance of a disease or poor health.

image.rawDefinition: An optical or other representation of a real object; a graphic; a picture.

lock.rawDefinition: Something used for fastening, which can only be opened with a key or combination.

lorry.rawDefinition: A motor vehicle for transporting goods, and in some cases people; a truck.

lost.rawDefinition: To cause (something) to cease to be in one's possession or capability due to unfortunate or unknown circumstances, events or reasons.

loud.rawDefinition: A loud sound or part of a sound.

loudly.rawDefinition: In a loud manner; at a high volume.

lovely.rawDefinition: An attractive, lovely person, especially a (professional) beauty.

low.rawDefinition: Something that is low; a low point.

luck.rawDefinition: Something that happens to someone by chance, a chance occurrence, especially a favourable one.

lucky.rawDefinition: (of people) Favoured by luck; fortunate; having good success or good fortune

male.rawDefinition: One of the male (masculine) sex or gender.

manage.rawDefinition: The act of managing or controlling something.

manager.rawDefinition: A person whose job is to manage something, such as a business, a restaurant, or a sports team.

marry.rawDefinition: To enter into the conjugal or connubial state; to take a husband or a wife.

mathematics.rawDefinition: An abstract representational system used in the study of numbers, shapes, structure, change and the relationships between these concepts.

maths.rawDefinition: An abstract representational system used in the study of numbers, shapes, structure, change and the relationships between these concepts.

may.rawDefinition: To be strong; to have power (over).

medicine.rawDefinition: A substance which specifically promotes healing when ingested or consumed in some way.

memory.rawDefinition: The ability of the brain to record information or impressions with the facility of recalling them later at will.

metal.rawDefinition: (heading) Chemical elements or alloys, and the mines where their ores come from.

might.rawDefinition: Power, strength, force or influence held by a person or group.

mine.rawDefinition: My; belonging to me; that which belongs to me.

mirror.rawDefinition: A smooth surface, usually made of glass with reflective material painted on the underside, that reflects light so as to give an image of what is in front of it.

mobile.rawDefinition: A kinetic sculpture or decorative arrangement made of items hanging so that they can move independently from each other.

monkey.rawDefinition: Any member of the clade Simiiformes not also of the clade Hominoidea containing humans and apes, from which they are usually, but not universally, distinguished by smaller size, a tail, and cheek pouches.

moon.rawDefinition: The Earth's moon Luna; the sole natural satellite of the Earth, represented in astronomy and astrology by ☾.

mostly.rawDefinition: Mainly or chiefly; for the most part; usually, generally, on the whole.

motorcycle.rawDefinition: An open-seated motor vehicle with handlebars instead of a steering wheel, and having two (or sometimes three) wheels.

musical.rawDefinition: A stage performance, show or film that involves singing, dancing and musical numbers performed by the cast as well as acting.

musician.rawDefinition: A composer, conductor, or performer of music; specifically, a person who sings and/or plays a musical instrument as a hobby, an occupation, or a profession.

myself.rawDefinition: (reflexive pronoun) Me, as direct or indirect object the speaker as the object of a verb or preposition, when the speaker is also the subject.

narrow.rawDefinition: (chiefly in the plural) A narrow passage, especially a contracted part of a stream, lake, or sea; a strait connecting two bodies of water.

nature.rawDefinition: The natural world; that which consists of all things unaffected by or predating human technology, production, and design. (Compare ecosystem.)

neck.rawDefinition: The part of the body connecting the head and the trunk found in humans and some animals.

noise.rawDefinition: Various sounds, usually unwanted or unpleasant.

noisy.rawDefinition: Making a noise, especially a loud unpleasant sound

normal.rawDefinition: A line or vector that is perpendicular to another line, surface, or plane.

normally.rawDefinition: Under normal conditions or circumstances; usually; most of the time

ocean.rawDefinition: One of the large bodies of water separating the continents.

offer.rawDefinition: A proposal that has been made.

officer.rawDefinition: One who has a position of authority in a hierarchical organization, especially in military, police or government organizations.

onto.rawDefinition: (of a function) Assuming each of the values in its codomain; having its range equal to its codomain.

ordinary.rawDefinition: A person with authority; authority, ordinance.

ourselves.rawDefinition: (reflexive pronoun) Us; the group including the speaker as the object of a verb or preposition when that group also is the subject.

oven.rawDefinition: A chamber used for baking or heating.

own.rawDefinition: Belonging to; possessed; proper to. Often marks a possessive determiner as reflexive, referring back to the subject of the clause or sentence.

pack.rawDefinition: A bundle made up and prepared to be carried; especially, a bundle to be carried on the back, but also a load for an animal, a bale.

pain.rawDefinition: An ache or bodily suffering, or an instance of this; an unpleasant sensation, resulting from a derangement of functions, disease, or injury by violence; hurt.

palace.rawDefinition: Official residence of a head of state or other dignitary, especially in a monarchical or imperial governmental system.

pants.rawDefinition: (Manchester) An outer garment that covers the body from the waist downwards, covering each leg separately, usually as far as the ankles; trousers.

pay.rawDefinition: Money given in return for work; salary or wages.

peace.rawDefinition: A state of tranquility, quiet, and harmony; absence of violence. For instance, a state free from civil disturbance.

penny.rawDefinition: In the United Kingdom and Ireland, a copper coin worth 1/240 of a pound sterling or Irish pound before decimalisation. Abbreviation: d.

per cent.rawDefinition: A percentage, a proportion (especially per hundred).

permission.rawDefinition: Authorisation; consent (especially formal consent from someone in authority)

pet.rawDefinition: An animal kept as a companion.

petrol.rawDefinition: Petroleum, a fluid consisting of a mixture of refined petroleum hydrocarbons, primarily consisting of octane, commonly used as a motor fuel.

photograph.rawDefinition: A picture created by projecting an image onto a photosensitive surface such as a chemically treated plate or film, CCD receptor, etc.

physics.rawDefinition: A medicine or drug, especially a cathartic or purgative.

pick.rawDefinition: A tool used for digging; a pickaxe.

pilot.rawDefinition: A person who steers a ship, a helmsman.

planet.rawDefinition: Each of the seven major bodies which move relative to the fixed stars in the night sky—the Moon, Mercury, Venus, the Sun, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn.

plant.rawDefinition: An organism that is not an animal, especially an organism capable of photosynthesis. Typically a small or herbaceous organism of this kind, rather than a tree.

plastic.rawDefinition: A synthetic, solid, hydrocarbon-based polymer, whether thermoplastic or thermosetting.

plate.rawDefinition: A slightly curved but almost flat dish from which food is served or eaten.

platform.rawDefinition: A raised stage from which speeches are made and on which musical and other performances are made.

pleased.rawDefinition: To make happy or satisfy; to give pleasure to.

pocket.rawDefinition: A bag stitched to an item of clothing, used for carrying small items.

polite.rawDefinition: To polish; to refine; to render polite.

pollution.rawDefinition: The desecration of something holy or sacred; defilement, profanation.

pop.rawDefinition: A loud, sharp sound as of a cork coming out of a bottle.

population.rawDefinition: The people living within a political or geographical boundary.

poster.rawDefinition: A picture of a celebrity, an event etc., intended to be attached to a wall.

power.rawDefinition: Ability to do or undergo something.

present.rawDefinition: The current moment or period of time.

president.rawDefinition: An act in the past which may be used as an example to help decide the outcome of similar instances in the future.

print.rawDefinition: Books and other material created by printing presses, considered collectively or as a medium.

prison.rawDefinition: A place or institution of confinement, especially of long-term confinement for those convicted of serious crimes or otherwise considered undesirable by the government.

prize.rawDefinition: That which is taken from another; something captured; a thing seized by force, stratagem, or superior power.

professor.rawDefinition: The most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution, informally also known as "full professor." Abbreviated Prof.

profile.rawDefinition: The outermost shape, view, or edge of an object.

promise.rawDefinition: An oath or affirmation; a vow

pronounce.rawDefinition: To declare formally, officially or ceremoniously.

pub.rawDefinition: A public house where beverages, primarily alcoholic, may be bought and consumed, also providing food and sometimes entertainment such as live music or television.

public.rawDefinition: The people in general, regardless of membership of any particular group.

push.rawDefinition: A short, directed application of force; an act of pushing.

queen.rawDefinition: A female monarch. Example: Queen Victoria.

race.rawDefinition: A contest between people, animals, vehicles, etc. where the goal is to be the first to reach some objective. Example: Several horses run in a horse race, and the first one to reach the finishing post wins

railway.rawDefinition: A transport system using rails used to move passengers or goods.

raise.rawDefinition: An increase in wages or salary; a rise (UK).

reach.rawDefinition: The act of stretching or extending; extension.

receive.rawDefinition: An operation in which data is received.

recent.rawDefinition: Having happened a short while ago.

recipe.rawDefinition: A formula for preparing or using a medicine; a prescription; also, a medicine prepared from such instructions.

recognize.rawDefinition: To match (something or someone which one currently perceives) to a memory of some previous encounter with the same person or thing.

recommend.rawDefinition: To bestow commendation on; to represent favourably; to suggest, endorse or encourage as an appropriate choice.

record.rawDefinition: A disk, usually made of a polymer, used to record sound for playback on a phonograph.

recording.rawDefinition: To make a record of information.

reduce.rawDefinition: To bring down the size, quantity, quality, value or intensity of something; to diminish, to lower.

refuse.rawDefinition: Collectively, items or material that have been discarded; rubbish, garbage.

region.rawDefinition: Any considerable and connected part of a space or surface; specifically, a tract of land or sea of considerable but indefinite extent; a country; a district; in a broad sense, a place without special reference to location or extent but viewed as an entity for geographical, social or cultural reasons.

regular.rawDefinition: A member of the British Army (as opposed to a member of the Territorial Army or Reserve).

relationship.rawDefinition: Connection or association; the condition of being related.

replace.rawDefinition: To restore to a former place, position, condition, etc.; to put back

reply.rawDefinition: A written or spoken response; part of a conversation.

report.rawDefinition: A piece of information describing, or an account of certain events given or presented to someone, with the most common adpositions being by (referring to creator of the report) and on (referring to the subject).

request.rawDefinition: Act of requesting (with the adposition at in the presence of possessives, and on in their absence).

research.rawDefinition: Diligent inquiry or examination to seek or revise facts, principles, theories, applications, etc.; laborious or continued search after truth.

ring.rawDefinition: (physical) A solid object in the shape of a circle.

rise.rawDefinition: To move, or appear to move, physically upwards relative to the ground.

role.rawDefinition: A character or part played by a performer or actor.

roof.rawDefinition: The external covering at the top of a building.

round.rawDefinition: So as to form a circle or trace a circular path, or approximation thereof.

route.rawDefinition: A course or way which is traveled or passed.

runner.rawDefinition: Act or instance of running, of moving rapidly using the feet.

speech.rawDefinition: The faculty of uttering articulate sounds or words; the ability to speak or to use vocalizations to communicate.

speed.rawDefinition: The state of moving quickly or the capacity for rapid motion; rapidity.

spider.rawDefinition: Any of various eight-legged, predatory arthropods, of the order Araneae, most of which spin webs to catch prey.

spoon.rawDefinition: An implement for eating or serving; a scooped utensil whose long handle is straight, in contrast to a ladle.

square.rawDefinition: A polygon with four sides of equal length and four right angles; an equilateral rectangle; a regular quadrilateral.

stair.rawDefinition: A single step in a staircase.

stamp.rawDefinition: An act of stamping the foot, paw or hoof.

stay.rawDefinition: Continuance or a period of time spent in a place; abode for an indefinite time; sojourn.

step.rawDefinition: An advance or movement made from one foot to the other; a pace.

stomach.rawDefinition: An organ in animals that stores food in the process of digestion.

stone.rawDefinition: A hard earthen substance that can form large rocks.

store.rawDefinition: A place where items may be accumulated or routinely kept.

storm.rawDefinition: Any disturbed state of the atmosphere, especially as affecting the earth's surface, and strongly implying destructive or unpleasant weather.

straight.rawDefinition: Something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track.

such.rawDefinition: Something being indicated that is similar to something else.

suddenly.rawDefinition: Happening quickly and with little or no warning; in a sudden manner.

suggest.rawDefinition: To imply but stop short of saying explicitly.

suggestion.rawDefinition: Something suggested (with subsequent adposition being for)

suit.rawDefinition: A set of clothes to be worn together, now especially a man's matching jacket and trousers (also business suit or lounge suit), or a similar outfit for a woman.

suppose.rawDefinition: To take for granted; to conclude, with less than absolute supporting data; to believe.

surprised.rawDefinition: To cause (someone) to feel unusually alarmed or delighted by something unexpected.

surprising.rawDefinition: To cause (someone) to feel unusually alarmed or delighted by something unexpected.

sweet.rawDefinition: The basic taste sensation induced by sugar.

system.rawDefinition: A collection of organized things; a whole composed of relationships among its members.

tablet.rawDefinition: A slab of clay used for inscription.

task.rawDefinition: A piece of work done as part of one’s duties.

taste.rawDefinition: One of the sensations produced by the tongue in response to certain chemicals; the quality of giving this sensation.

teaching.rawDefinition: Something taught by a religious or philosophical authority.

technology.rawDefinition: The organization of knowledge for practical purposes.

temperature.rawDefinition: A measure of cold or heat, often measurable with a thermometer.

text.rawDefinition: A writing consisting of multiple glyphs, characters, symbols or sentences.

themselves.rawDefinition: The reflexive case of they, the third-person plural personal pronoun. The group of people, animals or objects previously mentioned, as the object of a verb or following a preposition (also used for emphasis).

thick.rawDefinition: The thickest, or most active or intense, part of something.

thief.rawDefinition: One who carries out a theft.

thin.rawDefinition: A loss or tearing of paper from the back of a stamp, although not sufficient to create a complete hole.

tip.rawDefinition: The tip of the external ear.

tool.rawDefinition: A mechanical device intended to make a task easier.

top.rawDefinition: The highest or uppermost part of something.

tour.rawDefinition: A journey through a particular building, estate, country, etc.

tourism.rawDefinition: The act of travelling or sightseeing, particularly away from one's home.

towel.rawDefinition: A cloth used for wiping, especially one used for drying anything wet, as a person after a bath.

tower.rawDefinition: A very tall iron-framed structure, usually painted red and white, on which microwave, radio, satellite, or other communication antennas are installed; mast.

toy.rawDefinition: Something to play with, especially as intended for use by a child.

track.rawDefinition: A mark left by something that has passed along.

tradition.rawDefinition: A part of culture that is passed from person to person or generation to generation, possibly differing in detail from family to family, such as the way to celebrate holidays.

trainer.rawDefinition: A person who trains another; a coach.

traveller.rawDefinition: A member of a particular nomadic ethnic minority in Ireland, the Pavee.

truck.rawDefinition: A small wheel or roller, specifically the wheel of a gun carriage.

twin.rawDefinition: Either of two people (or, less commonly, animals) who shared the same uterus at the same time; one who was born at the same birth as a sibling.

typical.rawDefinition: Anything that is typical, normal, or standard.

underground.rawDefinition: An underground railway, especially for mass transit of people in urban areas.

understanding.rawDefinition: To grasp a concept fully and thoroughly, especially (of words, statements, art, etc.) to be aware of the meaning of and (of people) to be aware of the intent of.

unfortunately.rawDefinition: Happening through bad luck, or because of some unfortunate event.

unhappy.rawDefinition: An individual who is not happy.

uniform.rawDefinition: A distinctive outfit that serves to identify members of a group.

unit.rawDefinition: A particular, minute unit of mass, defined differently for different substances, but so that varying substances of the same general type have the property that one international unit of the one has the same effect on the human body as one international unit of the other.

unusual.rawDefinition: Something that is unusual; an anomaly.

user.rawDefinition: One who uses or makes use of something, a consumer/client or an express or implied licensee (free user) or a trespasser.

usual.rawDefinition: The typical state of something, or something that is typical.

valley.rawDefinition: An elongated depression between hills or mountains, often with a river flowing through it.

van.rawDefinition: A covered vehicle used for carrying goods or people, usually roughly cuboid in shape, longer and higher than a car but smaller than a truck/lorry.

variety.rawDefinition: The quality of being varied; diversity.

vehicle.rawDefinition: A conveyance; a device for carrying or transporting substances, objects or individuals.

virus.rawDefinition: A submicroscopic, non-cellular structure consisting of a core of DNA or RNA surrounded by a protein coat, that requires a living host cell to replicate, and often causes disease in the host organism.

voice.rawDefinition: Sound uttered by the mouth, especially by human beings in speech or song; sound thus uttered considered as possessing some special quality or character

war.rawDefinition: Organized, large-scale, armed conflict between countries or between national, ethnic, or other sizeable groups, usually involving the engagement of military forces.

wash.rawDefinition: The process or an instance of washing or being washed by water or other liquid.

wave.rawDefinition: To move back and forth repeatedly and somewhat loosely.

weak.rawDefinition: Lacking in force (usually strength) or ability.

wedding.rawDefinition: To perform the marriage ceremony for; to join in matrimony.

welcome.rawDefinition: The act of greeting someone’s arrival, especially by saying "Welcome!"; reception.

wheel.rawDefinition: A circular device capable of rotating on its axis, facilitating movement or transportation or performing labour in machines.

while.rawDefinition: An uncertain duration of time, a period of time.

whole.rawDefinition: Something complete, without any parts missing.

whose.rawDefinition: (interrogative) That or those of whom or belonging to whom.

wide.rawDefinition: A ball that passes so far from the batsman that the umpire deems it unplayable; the arm signal used by an umpire to signal a wide; the extra run added to the batting side's score

wild.rawDefinition: The undomesticated state of a wild animal

wind.rawDefinition: Real or perceived movement of atmospheric air usually caused by convection or differences in air pressure.

winner.rawDefinition: One who has won or often wins.

wish.rawDefinition: A desire, hope, or longing for something or for something to happen.

wood.rawDefinition: The substance making up the central part of the trunk and branches of a tree. Used as a material for construction, to manufacture various items, etc. or as fuel.

worried.rawDefinition: Thinking about unpleasant things that have happened or that might happen; feeling afraid and unhappy.

yet.rawDefinition: (usually with negative) Thus far; up to the present; up to some specified time; still

yours.rawDefinition: That which belongs to you (singular); the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.
